sections.title: Before Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I don't want to go back! That orc tried to kill me!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: We must find a way to fight back! To throw those villains out of our homes.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I can't believe that there are orcs in Zanaris.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Have you heard? The Godfather has allowed orcs into Zanaris!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Those fairies that side with the Godfather are all traitors! The Queen is the true ruler of Zanaris!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Have you seen Fairy Cake? She went to talk to the Godfather and I haven't seen her since.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: How is the Queen? Has she woken up yet?

sections.title: After Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: The Queen is the true ruler of Zanaris! We shall over- throw the tyrant!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Once the council of war is finished we shall go and get rid of the Godfather.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: I'm so looking forward to going back home!

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Thank you for waking our queen.

lines.speaker: Fairy
lines.text: Now that the Queen is awake everything will be alright.
